goal: Validate stricter layer-to-asset binding for full_effect + asset_sheet generation.

observations: V2 asset_sheet top_currency_bar_bg is now the correct dark-brown capsule variant, unlike V1.
Stretch fit is still needed for the currency bar base because the visible full-effect slot is wider/shorter than the natural extracted sheet asset.
Remaining delta comes from fit/insets, the text rendering approximation, and small plus/heart scale differences rather than a cream-vs-brown variant mismatch.
V2 play_button_bg uses the correct green primary button variant and is cleaner than a post-hoc crop.

Visually, stretch fit better matches the wide button body, but this full-crop metric is affected by side flowers and garden background pixels; contain can score lower despite being obviously too small.
The remaining mismatch is mostly scale_mode/nine-slice plus decoration ownership, not asset variant mismatch.

conclusion: V2 fixes the obvious currency_bar asset variant mismatch. Remaining problems shift to fit strategy, nine-slice metadata, Text Node styling, and decoration ownership.
